eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: San Juan; Skagit; Whatcom, WA; at 1:00 PM on MAY 6, 2019 Effective until 2:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: "This is the Department of Emergency Management conducting a test of the Emergency Alert System. In the event of an emergency, this system would bring you important information. The following tones will conclude this test."
